task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo dashboard or an Odoo app (like Purchase or Inventory) is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Agent located the original receipt or purchase order for Apex Components.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated a return process for the received items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Reverse Transfer' or 'Return' popup/window is visible, showing the product 'Industrial Servo Motor'.

task_completion.description: Agent validated the return of exactly 3 units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A completed (status 'Done') return transfer document showing exactly 3 units of 'Industrial Servo Motor' being returned to the vendor.

task_completion.description: Agent created and posted a Vendor Credit Note (Refund) for the returned units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Vendor Credit Note or Refund document for 'Apex Components' is visible, showing 3 units of 'Industrial Servo Motor' with a total amount of $1350.00, and the status is 'Posted'.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is visible within a web browser window, not a terminal or script output.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual Odoo UI elements (buttons, breadcrumbs, status bars) rather than plain text files.

integrity.description: The return and credit note were genuinely created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface shows system-generated reference numbers (e.g., RET/..., RBILL/...) and standard Odoo status indicators.
